# Railway Environment Variables Checklist

## Quick Reference

This checklist ensures all required environment variables are configured for Railway deployment.

## Service: Backend API

### Database & Cache

```bash
# PostgreSQL (Auto-generated by Railway)
DATABASE_URL="postgresql+psycopg://user:pass@host:5432/dbname"

# Redis (Auto-generated by Railway)
REDIS_URL="redis://default:password@host:6379"

# Alternative: Use Railway's private networking
DATABASE_URL="postgresql+psycopg://postgres.railway.internal:5432/railway"
REDIS_URL="redis://redis.railway.internal:6379"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] DATABASE_URL configured
- [ ] REDIS_URL configured
- [ ] Database connection tested
- [ ] Redis connection tested

### Security & Authentication

```bash
# Application Secrets (REQUIRED - Generate secure random strings)
SECRET_KEY="your-super-secret-key-minimum-32-characters-long"
JWT_SECRET_KEY="your-jwt-secret-key-minimum-32-characters"
ENCRYPTION_KEY="base64-encoded-32-byte-fernet-key"  # Generate: python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())"

# Password Hashing
PASSLIB_BUILTIN_BCRYPT="enabled"

# CORS
FRONTEND_URL="https://frontend.railway.app"
ALLOWED_ORIGINS='["https://frontend.railway.app","https://app.yourdomain.com"]'
```

**Status:**
- [ ] SECRET_KEY generated and set (min 32 chars)
- [ ] JWT_SECRET_KEY generated and set (min 32 chars)
- [ ] ENCRYPTION_KEY generated and set
- [ ] FRONTEND_URL configured
- [ ] CORS origins configured

**Generate secure keys:**
```bash
# SECRET_KEY
python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))"

# JWT_SECRET_KEY
python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))"

# ENCRYPTION_KEY
python -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())"
```

### Supabase

```bash
VITE_SUPABASE_URL="https://your-project.supabase.co"
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."  # Backend only, DO NOT expose to frontend
```

**Status:**
- [ ] VITE_SUPABASE_URL configured
- [ ] VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY configured
- [ ] SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY configured (backend only)
- [ ] Supabase connection tested

### Firebase (Optional)

```bash
# Firebase Admin SDK
FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS='{"type":"service_account","project_id":"...","private_key_id":"...","private_key":"-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\n...\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----\n","client_email":"...","client_id":"...","auth_uri":"...","token_uri":"...","auth_provider_x509_cert_url":"...","client_x509_cert_url":"..."}'

# Or individual credentials
FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID="your-project-id"
FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY="-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\n...\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----\n"
FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL="firebase-adminsdk@your-project.iam.gserviceaccount.com"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Firebase credentials configured (if using Firebase)
- [ ] Firebase connection tested

### AI Integration

```bash
# Google Gemini
GEMINI_API_KEY="AIzaSy..."
GEMINI_MODEL="gemini-2.0-flash-exp"  # Default model

# Optional: OpenAI
OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-..."
```

**Status:**
- [ ] GEMINI_API_KEY configured
- [ ] AI integration tested

### WhatsApp Integration

```bash
# Evolution API
WHATSAPP_API_URL="https://your-evolution-api.com"
WHATSAPP_API_KEY="your-evolution-api-key"
WHATSAPP_INSTANCE_NAME="hormonia-instance"

# Optional: Webhook configuration
WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_URL="https://backend-api.railway.app/api/v1/whatsapp/webhook"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] WHATSAPP_API_URL configured
- [ ] WHATSAPP_API_KEY configured
- [ ] WHATSAPP_INSTANCE_NAME configured
- [ ] WhatsApp integration tested

### Python Configuration

```bash
# Python Runtime
PYTHONUNBUFFERED="1"
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE="1"
PYTHONPATH="/app"

# Environment
ENVIRONMENT="production"
LOG_LEVEL="info"  # Options: debug, info, warning, error, critical

# Server
WEB_CONCURRENCY="4"  # Number of Gunicorn workers
WORKERS_PER_CORE="1"
MAX_WORKERS="8"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Python configuration set
- [ ] Environment set to production
- [ ] Log level configured

### Monitoring & Observability (Optional)

```bash
# Sentry
SENTRY_DSN="https://...@o...ingest.sentry.io/..."
SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT="production"
SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE="0.1"  # 10% of transactions

# Datadog
DD_API_KEY="..."
DD_ENV="production"
DD_SERVICE="backend-api"

# New Relic
NEW_RELIC_LICENSE_KEY="..."
NEW_RELIC_APP_NAME="Hormonia Backend"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Monitoring configured (if using)

---

## Service: Frontend

### Build Configuration

```bash
# Node Environment
NODE_ENV="production"

# Vite Build
VITE_ENVIRONMENT="production"
VITE_DEBUG_MODE="false"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] NODE_ENV set to production
- [ ] Build configuration verified

### API Endpoints

```bash
# Backend API (Use Railway's public domain)
VITE_API_URL="https://backend-api.railway.app/api/v1"
VITE_API_BASE_URL="https://backend-api.railway.app"
VITE_WS_BASE_URL="wss://backend-api.railway.app/ws"

# Or custom domain
VITE_API_URL="https://api.yourdomain.com/api/v1"
VITE_API_BASE_URL="https://api.yourdomain.com"
VITE_WS_BASE_URL="wss://api.yourdomain.com/ws"
```

**Status:**
- [ ] VITE_API_URL configured with backend URL
- [ ] VITE_API_BASE_URL configured
- [ ] VITE_WS_BASE_URL configured
- [ ] API connectivity tested

### Supabase (Same as Backend)

```bash
VITE_SUPABASE_URL="https://your-project.supabase.co"
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
```

**Status:**
- [ ] VITE_SUPABASE_URL configured
- [ ] VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY configured

### Firebase (Loaded at Runtime)

**Note:** Firebase configuration is loaded dynamically from backend `/api/config` endpoint.

```bash
# These are NOT needed as build-time variables
# They are fetched at runtime from backend
# VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY - ❌ NOT NEEDED
# VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN - ❌ NOT NEEDED
# etc.
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Verified Firebase config loaded from backend
- [ ] Runtime config endpoint tested

### Application Configuration

```bash
# WhatsApp Instance
VITE_WHATSAPP_INSTANCE_NAME="hormonia-instance"

# Analytics (Optional)
VITE_GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_ID="G-..."
VITE_HOTJAR_ID="..."
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Application configuration set

### Server Configuration (Nginx)

```bash
# Port (Auto-set by Railway)
PORT="3000"  # Railway will override this dynamically
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Port configuration verified (Railway auto-sets)

---

## Service: Celery Worker

**Uses same environment variables as Backend API**

### Additional Celery Configuration

```bash
# Celery Broker (Redis)
CELERY_BROKER_URL="$REDIS_URL"  # Same as REDIS_URL

# Celery Backend
CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND="$REDIS_URL"

# Celery Configuration
CELERY_WORKER_CONCURRENCY="4"
CELERY_TASK_TIME_LIMIT="600"  # 10 minutes
CELERY_TASK_SOFT_TIME_LIMIT="540"  # 9 minutes
```

**Status:**
- [ ] Celery broker configured
- [ ] Worker concurrency set
- [ ] Task limits configured

---

## Service: Celery Beat

**Uses same environment variables as Backend API + Celery Worker**

**Status:**
- [ ] Beat scheduler configured
- [ ] Only 1 replica running (important!)

---

## Environment Variable Security

### ✅ DO:
- Set all secrets in Railway dashboard
- Use Railway's built-in secret management
- Rotate credentials regularly
- Use strong, random keys (min 32 chars)
- Enable Railway's secret scanning
- Use environment-specific values

### ❌ DON'T:
- Commit secrets to Git
- Use weak or short keys
- Share production credentials
- Use same keys for dev/staging/prod
- Store secrets in code or Dockerfiles
- Use wildcards in CORS (`allow_origins=["*"]`)

## Validation Commands

### Test Backend Connection
```bash
railway run --service backend-api "python -c 'import app.core.config; print(\"Config loaded successfully\")'"
```

### Test Database Connection
```bash
railway run --service backend-api "python -c 'from app.core.database import engine; engine.connect(); print(\"Database connected\")'"
```

### Test Redis Connection
```bash
railway run --service backend-api "python -c 'import redis; r=redis.from_url(\"$REDIS_URL\"); r.ping(); print(\"Redis connected\")'"
```

### Test Frontend Build
```bash
railway run --service frontend "npm run build:prod"
```

## Migration Checklist

### Before First Deployment
- [ ] All environment variables set
- [ ] Database credentials verified
- [ ] Redis connection tested
- [ ] Supabase connection tested
- [ ] All secrets generated and stored

### After Deployment
- [ ] Run database migrations: `alembic upgrade head`
- [ ] Verify health checks passing
- [ ] Test API endpoints
- [ ] Verify frontend can reach backend
- [ ] Check logs for errors

## Quick Setup Script

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# railway-setup.sh - Quick environment variable setup

# Login to Railway
railway login

# Link to project
railway link

# Backend Variables
railway variables set SECRET_KEY="$(python -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))')"
railway variables set JWT_SECRET_KEY="$(python -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))')"
railway variables set ENCRYPTION_KEY="$(python -c 'from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())')"
railway variables set PYTHONUNBUFFERED="1"
railway variables set PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE="1"
railway variables set PASSLIB_BUILTIN_BCRYPT="enabled"
railway variables set ENVIRONMENT="production"
railway variables set LOG_LEVEL="info"

# Frontend Variables
railway variables set NODE_ENV="production"
railway variables set VITE_ENVIRONMENT="production"
railway variables set VITE_DEBUG_MODE="false"

echo "✅ Basic environment variables set"
echo "⚠️  Remember to set:"
echo "   - DATABASE_URL (auto-generated)"
echo "   - REDIS_URL (auto-generated)"
echo "   - VITE_SUPABASE_URL"
echo "   - VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY"
echo "   - GEMINI_API_KEY"
echo "   - WHATSAPP_* credentials"
```
